settings.title: What you want
settings.text: Confirm whether you are interested in templates, a packaged opportunity, a custom build, an asset listing, or advisory support.

settings.title: Budget and timing
settings.text: Share your expected budget range, timeline, preferred level of support, and any operational constraints.

settings.title: Next step
settings.text: Your application can be routed to a product purchase, enquiry, review pack, seller follow-up, or custom build conversation.

settings.heading: Apply as a marketplace buyer
settings.text: This page gives buyers a clearer pathway when they want to request more information, compare opportunities, or move toward a listed asset or build package.

settings.title: Confidentiality Process
settings.description: Review access rules for sensitive information.

settings.heading: Useful pages before applying
settings.text: These resources explain the buyer journey, review packs, confidentiality, and marketplace expectations.
